case_title: LIANXIN LIU VS. WELLS FARGO & COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LIANXIN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAN VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY SUSAN GARVIN, OPERATIONS RISK CONSULTANT. OTHER APPEARANCE: PLAINTIFF WITNESS DAVID LU, HUSBAND. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, LIANXIN AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-24-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
(SC-109)AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -SUSAN GARVIN TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF WELLS FARGO FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXIBITS RECD VIA MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUL-15-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LIANXIN LIU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY SUSAN GARVIN, OPERATIONAL RISK CONSULTANT. THE COURT ORDERS WELLS FARGO & COMPANY TO PROVIDE TO THE COURT, BY JUN-27-2022, SURVEILLANCE CAMERA FOOTAGE FROM 3 LOCATIONS: STOCKTON STREET, SLOAT STREET AND 3RD STREET. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCES IS EXTENDED TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL
CORRESPONDENCE -VIA DROP BOX 5/13/22; DOCUMENTS PLACED IN FILE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, LIANXIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY $4,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,990.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,400.00 FILED BY LIU, LIANXIN AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED** FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
